dataset_description: Synthetic dataset of elderly population with physical activity and psychological assessment scores.

variables.name: participant_id
variables.rule: Sequential integer from 1 to N. Must be unique, no repetitions.

variables.name: age
variables.rule: Sample from Normal(mean=74, sd=6), truncated to [65, 90]. Round to integer.

variables.name: education_years
variables.rule: Sample from Normal(mean=7, sd=4), truncated to [0, 16].

variables.name: monthly_income
variables.rule: income = clip(exp(5.8 + 0.025 * education_years + Normal(0, 0.85)), 300, 5000). Round to 2 decimal places. Produces log-normal distribution with r(education_years, monthly_income) ≈ 0.30–0.45.

variables.name: marital_status
variables.rule: Stratified by gender and age bracket.

variables.name: living_situation
variables.rule: Conditional on marital_status. Generate comorbidities_count first.
adjustments: Add +0.03 to P(Institution) per comorbidity above 3 (i.e., per unit of max(0, comorbidities_count - 3)).

variables.name: comorbidities_count
variables.description: Number of chronic comorbidities. Non-negative integer.
variables.rule: Sample from Poisson(λ). Brackets are mutually exclusive.

variables.name: physical_activity_days_per_week
adjustments: Age penalty: for each 5 years above 65, subtract 0.02 from P(≥4 days) and redistribute to P(0 days).
Comorbidity penalty: P(0 days) += 0.03 per comorbidity above 1, capped at P(0 days) = 0.45.

variables.name: physical_activity_minutes_per_session
variables.rule: If physical_activity_days_per_week = 0, set to 0. Otherwise sample from Normal(mean=35, sd=15) truncated to [10, 90], round to integer.

variables.name: physical_activity_total_minutes_week
variables.description: Total weekly physical activity minutes. Derived with mandatory noise.
variables.rule: If days = 0, set to 0 exactly. Otherwise: base = days * minutes_per_session; sigma = max(0.20 * base + 8, 10); total = max(0, round(base + Normal(0, sigma))). Noise is mandatory: total must differ from base by ≥10% on average.

variables.name: physical_activity_type
variables.rule: If days = 0, set to 0. If days > 0, sample from [0,1,2,3,4,5] with probabilities [0, 0.45, 0.20, 0.18, 0.12, 0.05]. If type 0 is drawn for days > 0, resample until type ≠ 0.

variables.name: physical_activity_intensity
variables.rule: If days = 0, set to 0. If days > 0, assign based on type (intensity must be in {1,2,3}, never 0).
variables.assertion: If physical_activity_days_per_week > 0, physical_activity_intensity must be in {1, 2, 3}. Never 0.

variables.name: sleep_hours
variables.rule: Sample from Normal(mean=7.0, sd=1.1), truncated to [4.0, 10.0]. Round to 1 decimal place.

formula.raw: Normal(5, 3.5) + (0.40 * comorbidities_count) - (0.003 * physical_activity_total_minutes_week) - (0.12 * sleep_hours) + (0.80 * female_dummy) - (0.012 * (monthly_income / 100)) + (1.00 * widowed_dummy) + (0.50 * divorced_dummy) + Normal(0, 5.0)
formula.note: Save the pre-clip raw value for use in gad7_total calculation.

variables.name: phq9_classe
variables.description: Clinical classification of PHQ-9 depression score. Deterministic mapping, no noise.
variables.rule: if 0 <= phq9_total <= 4 → 'Mínima'; elif 5 <= phq9_total <= 9 → 'Leve'; elif 10 <= phq9_total <= 14 → 'Moderada'; elif 15 <= phq9_total <= 19 → 'Mod. grave'; elif 20 <= phq9_total <= 27 → 'Grave'.

formula.raw: Normal(4, 2.5) + (0.35 * comorbidities_count) - (0.002 * physical_activity_total_minutes_week) - (0.09 * sleep_hours) + (0.60 * female_dummy) + (0.02 * raw_phq9) + Normal(0, 6.0)

variables.name: gad7_classe
variables.description: Clinical classification of GAD-7 anxiety score. Deterministic mapping, no noise.
variables.rule: if 0 <= gad7_total <= 4 → 'Mínima'; elif 5 <= gad7_total <= 9 → 'Leve'; elif 10 <= gad7_total <= 14 → 'Moderada'; elif 15 <= gad7_total <= 21 → 'Grave'.

realism_constraints: participant_id must be unique and strictly sequential.
phq9_total and gad7_total can be 0. Do not floor above 0.
physical_activity_total_minutes_week must differ from days × minutes by at least ±10% on average. Exception: if days = 0, total = 0 exactly.
~5–10% of active participants (days > 0) must have phq9_total ≥ 15.
~5–10% of sedentary participants (days = 0) must have phq9_total ≤ 3.
Do NOT produce deterministic patterns. All derived variables must include stochastic noise.

post_hoc_overrides.description: After the main generation loop, apply the following dissociated-extreme overrides by selecting random participants and overriding their scores.
